I'm reaching out because the Malaysia-Bangladesh labour corridor is reopening, and we're building a direct-source channel for documented, pre-screened Bangladeshi workers.

Direct-source front-line workers from Bangladesh. Lower cost, fully documented, no agent markups.

Our model:
- RBA-aligned: zero worker-paid recruitment fees available on the employer-pays track
- FWCMS-compatible processing, TURAP-ready if/when adopted
- Complete documentation: BMET clearance, FOMEMA medical, PDOT trained

If Village Grocer is planning 2026-2027 hiring and wants a compliance-safe alternative to the current agency channel, I'd welcome a brief call.

Malaysia Corridor Ops | wa.me/880XXXXXXXXXX

This is an information & registration service; the corridor is currently closed pending the labour MoU. No fees are collected through this outreach.
